systemic_issues.detail: References golang-patterns-advanced in footer — actual directory is go-patterns-advanced. Broken cross-reference.
Version contradiction: frontmatter says 2.1.0, body contains 'What's New in v2.2' feature table.
systemic_issues.fix: Align version to 2.2.0 in frontmatter or remove v2.2 table from body.

systemic_issues.detail: Process/lifecycle skills average 29% actionability vs 58% for technical skills.
systemic_issues.fix: Add concrete step-by-step workflows and decision trees to lift actionability.

systemic_issues.detail: 31% of analyzed skills (14/45) exceed 400-line ideal. Root cause: advanced/stack-specific content not split into companion skill.
systemic_issues.fix: Extract advanced sections into *-advanced companion skills where they don't already exist.

systemic_issues.detail: RFC 7807 inconsistency: api-design recommends RFC 7807 (no success flag), but tdd-workflow integration test example checks data.success:true.
systemic_issues.fix: Update tdd-workflow integration test example to use RFC 7807 error shape.

issues: SYS-05: success flag in test example
SYS-02: version contradiction 2.1.0 vs v2.2 in body
